trans-unit.note: Bundle display name
Bundle name

trans-unit.source: Vocable uses your device's front camera to detect minimal changes in head orientation and position. This allows users with limited mobility to control an on-screen pointer to interact with the app. Camera data is used expressly for controlling the on-screen pointer. This data is not stored or transmitted in any way. Vocable needs permission to use the camera for this purpose.
trans-unit.target: Vocable bruger din enheds frontkamera til at registrere minimale ændringer i hovedretning og position. Dette giver brugere med begrænset mobilitet mulighed for at styre en markør på skærmen for at interagere med appen. Kameradata bruges udtrykkeligt til at styre markøren på skærmen. Disse data gemmes eller overføres ikke på nogen måde. Vocable skal have tilladelse til at bruge kameraet til dette formål.
trans-unit.note: Camera usage description

trans-unit.source: Vocable uses the microphone only when listening mode is enabled. Vocable transcribes audio into text; it is not stored or transmitted except when the user chooses to share this information anonymously with developers to help improve listening mode.
trans-unit.target: Vocable bruger kun mikrofonen, når lyttetilstand er aktiveret. Vocable transcribes audio til tekst det er ikke gemt eller overført, undtagen når brugeren vælger at dele disse oplysninger anonymt med udviklere for at hjælpe med at forbedre lyttetilstand.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Microphone Usage Description

trans-unit.source: When listening mode is enabled, Vocable uses speech recognition to convert audio data into text. Transcribed speech is not stored or transmitted except when the user chooses to share this information anonymously with developers to help improve listening mode.
trans-unit.target: Når lyttetilstand er aktiveret, bruger Vocable talegenkendelse til at konvertere lyddata til tekst. Transskriberet tale gemmes eller transmitteres ikke, undtagen når brugeren vælger at dele disse oplysninger anonymt med udviklere for at hjælpe med at forbedre lyttetilstanden.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Speech Recognition Usage Description
Categories Header title. This appears in the Settings flow when navigating to the list of Categories
Delete category alert cancel button title
Delete category alert action button title

trans-unit.target: Slettede kategorier kan ikke blive gendannet.
trans-unit.note: Delete category confirmation alert title
Delete phrase alert cancel button title
Delete phrase alert action button title
Delete phrase confirmation alert title
Setting option for a category. Navigates the user to a list of phrases within the category where the phrases can be deleted or edited.
Setting option for a category. Button that will delete the category. Tapping the button will display an alert confirmation.
Setting option for a category. Navigates the user to a keyboard view where they can edit the Category name.

Toggle option for a category within settings. Can be toggled on or off to hide or show the category in the main view. Hiding the category will also move the category in settings to the end of the list.
changes to an existing phrase were saved successfully
Toast message that appears after saving edits made to the Category title
Category empty state button. This button appears with the empty state to allow the user to add a phrase

trans-unit.source: No phrases have been saved yet.
trans-unit.target: Ingen sætninger er blevet gemt endnu.
trans-unit.note: Category empty state. This empty state appears when there are no phrases in the category in both the main screen and settings screen.
Cancel alert action title
Confirm alert action title

trans-unit.source: Turning off head tracking will make Vocable touch-only. Would you like to continue?
trans-unit.target: At slå hovedsporing fra vil gøre Vocable touch-kun. Vil du fortsætte?
trans-unit.note: Disable head tracking confirmation alert title

trans-unit.source: Please move closer to the device.
trans-unit.note: Warning message presented to the user when the head tracking system

trans-unit.source: When someone asks a question out loud, Vocable will offer quick response options.
trans-unit.target: Når nogen stiller et spørgsmål højt, vil Vocable tilbyde hurtige svarmuligheder.
trans-unit.note: Listening mode empty state message for when listening has began but no responses have been displayed yet
Listening mode empty state title for when listening has began but no responses have been displayed yet

trans-unit.source: Not sure what to suggest. Please use the keyboard or select an existing phrase to reply.
trans-unit.target: Ikke sikker på hvad du skal foreslå. Brug tastaturet eller vælg en eksisterende sætning for at svare.
trans-unit.note: Listen mode empty state message for when no responses could be generated
Listen mode empty state title for when no responses could be generated
Listen mode empty state action that will allow the user to open the Settings app in order to grant microphone permissions.

trans-unit.source:
Vocable needs to use the microphone to enable Listening Mode. Please allow microphone access in %1$@ Settings.
You can also disable Listening Mode to hide this category.
trans-unit.target:
Vocable skal bruge mikrofonen for at aktivere Lytningstilstand. Tillad venligst mikrofonadgang i %1$@ indstillinger.
Du kan også deaktivere Lytningstilstand for at skjule denne kategori.
trans-unit.note: Listening mode empty state message for when microphone permissions are required, but the user has denied them
Listening mode empty state title for when microphone permissions are required, but the user has denied them
Listening mode empty state action that will allow the user to grant access to microphone permissions via the system permissions alert.

trans-unit.source: Vocable needs microphone access to enable Listening Mode. The button below presents an iOS permission dialog that Vocable's head tracking cannot interract with.
trans-unit.target: Vocable behøver mikrofonadgang for at aktivere Lytningstilstand. Knappen nedenfor viser en iOS-tilladelsesdialog, som Vocable's hovedsporing ikke kan interragere med.
trans-unit.note: Listening mode empty state message for when microphone permissions are required and the user has not been shown the system permissions prompt yet
Listening mode empty state title for when microphone permissions are required and the user has not been shown the system permissions prompt yet
Listening mode empty state action that will allow the user to open the Settings app in order to grant speech recognition permissions.

trans-unit.source:
Vocable needs speech recognition to enable Listening Mode. Please enable speech recognition in %1$@ Settings.
You can also disable Listening Mode to hide this category.
trans-unit.target:
Vocable har brug for talegenkendelse for at aktivere Lytningstilstand. Aktiver venligst talegenkendelse i %1$@ Indstillinger.
Du kan også deaktivere Lytningstilstand for at skjule denne kategori.
trans-unit.note: Listening mode empty state message for when speech recognition permissions are required, but the user has denied them
Listening mode empty state title for when speech recognition permissions are required, but the user has denied them
Listen mode empty state action that will allow the user to grant access to speech recognition permissions via the system permissions alert.

trans-unit.source: Vocable needs to request speech permissions to enable Listening Mode. This will present an iOS permission dialog that Vocable's head tracking cannot interract with.
trans-unit.target: Vocable skal anmode om taletilladelser for at aktivere lyttetilstand. Dette vil præsentere en iOS-tilladelsesdialog, som Vocables hovedsporing ikke kan interagere med.
trans-unit.note: Listening mode empty state message for when speech recognition permissions are required and the user has not been shown the system permissions prompt yet
Listening mode empty state title for when speech recognition permissions are required and the user has not been shown the system permissions prompt yet

trans-unit.source: Speech services require one of the following features to be enabled on your device: Siri or Dictation. Please check your device settings and enable Siri or Dictation.
trans-unit.target: Taletjenester kræver, at en af følgende funktioner er aktiveret på din enhed: Siri eller Diktering. Tjek venligst dine enhedsindstillinger og aktivér Siri eller Diktering.
trans-unit.note: Listening mode error state message for when Apple's speech to text service is unavailable
Listening mode error state title for when Apple's speech to text service is unavailable

trans-unit.source:
This %1$@ on %2$@ %3$@ does not support Listening Mode.
Listening Mode is currently only available in English and requires %5$@ to be enabled.
trans-unit.target:
Dette %1$@ på %2$@ %3$@ understøtter ikke Lyttetilstand.
Lyttetilstand er i øjeblikket kun tilgængelig på engelsk og kræver %5$@ for at være aktiveret.
trans-unit.note: Listening mode empty state message for when microphone permissions are required, but listening mode is unsupported
Listening mode empty state title for for when microphone permissions are required, but listening mode is unsupported

trans-unit.source: Please check your internet connection and try again later.
trans-unit.target: Tjek din internetforbindelse, og prøv igen senere.
trans-unit.note: Listen mode error state message for when the vocable API fails
Listen mode error state message for when the vocable API fails
Thank you confirmation. This text appears after sharing with developer

trans-unit.source: Don’t like these responses? Anonymously share this question to help improve listening mode.
trans-unit.target: Kan du ikke lide disse svar? Anonymt dele dette spørgsmål for at hjælpe med at forbedre lyttetilstand.
trans-unit.note: Information text around what the Share with Deeveloper button does.
Share with Developer button. The button appears if Listen mode could not generate a reponese.

trans-unit.target: Vælg noget nedenunder for at snakke
trans-unit.note: Select something below to speak Hint Text
Page indicator progress format. \"Page x of n\"
Action button for the personal voices screen allowing the user to open the system settings app to resolve an error.

trans-unit.source:
Vocable needs permission to access Personal Voices on this device.
You can enable access in %1$@ Settings.
trans-unit.target:
Vocable har brug for tilladelse til at tilgå personlige stemmer på denne enhed.
Du kan aktivere adgang i %1$@ Indstillinger.
trans-unit.note: Empty state description for when Personal Voice access has been denied by the user. It informs the user how to re-enable access by navigating to system settings. The placeholder is the device model (e.g. "iPhone" or "iPad")
Title of the Personal Voices screen empty state when a user must grant access to the app.

trans-unit.source: You can create a new Personal Voice in %1$@ Settings. Once created, you can set your Personal Voice as Vocable's voice.
trans-unit.target: Du kan oprette en ny personlig stemme i %1$@ indstillinger. Når den er oprettet, kan du indstille din personlige stemme som Vocable's stemme.
trans-unit.note: Empty state description for when there are not personal voices to display. This is typically because the user has not created any yet. The placeholder is the device model (e.g. "iPhone" or "iPad").
Title of the Personal Voices screen empty state when there are no voices available on the device.
Action button for the personal voices screen that will display a system prompt allowing access to their Personal Voice profiles stored on their device.

trans-unit.source: Allow Vocable to access Personal Voices stored on this device.
trans-unit.target: Tillad Vocable at få adgang til personlige stemmer gemt på denne enhed.
trans-unit.note: Empty state description for when Personal Voice access has not yet been prompted to the user. Below this text will be a button that will prompt the user for access.
Title of the Personal Voices screen empty state when a user has denied access to the app.
Title of the Personal Voices screen

Button in the Phrase close confirmation. This button appears in an alert when there are edits made to the Category title and the user tries to close the keyboard without saving the changes. Pressing the button will allow editing the category title.

Button in the edit Phrase close confirmation. This button appears in an alert when there are edits made to the Phrase and the user tries to close the keyboard without saving the changes. Pressing the button will not save any changes and close the keyboard view.

trans-unit.source: If you close without saving, your changes will be lost.
trans-unit.target: Hvis du lukker uden at gemme, vil dine ændringer gå tabt.
trans-unit.note: Phrase editor close confirmation text. This text appears in an alert when there are edits made to the Phrase and the user tries to close the keyboard without saving the changes.
Duplicate Phrase alert cancel button. Text on this button appears on an alert where a duplicate phrase is being created. Pressing the button allows the user to continue editing the category title.
Duplicate Phrase alert create duplicate button. Pressing this button will allow for multiple categories with the same title.

trans-unit.source: This phrase already exists. Would you like to create a duplicate?
trans-unit.target: Denne sætning findes allerede. Vil du oprette en dublet?
trans-unit.note: Duplicate Phrase alert text. This text appears in an alert when a phrase is created with the same text as an existing phrase within the same category.
Informs the user that their newly-created phrase was successfully saved. The variable parameter is the name of the category that the phrase was saved to.
Add phrase to category button title
'No' num pad response
'Yes' num pad response

trans-unit.source: Start using Vocable to see your most recently used phrases here.
trans-unit.target: Begynd at bruge Vocable for at se dine senest brugte sætninger her.
trans-unit.note: Recents empty state body string. This will appear in the Recents Category if no phrases have been used yet.
Recents empty state title string. This will appear in the Recents Category if no phrases have been used yet.
Selection mode setting header title
No email account configured error alert dismiss button title

trans-unit.source: Please sign into an account with Mail for %1$@.
trans-unit.target: Log venligst på en konto med Mail for %1$@.
trans-unit.note: No email account configured error alert title

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to reset Vocable to default settings? This action cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target: Er du sikker på, at du vil nulstille Vocable til standardindstillinger? Denne handling kan ikke fortrydes.
trans-unit.note: Reset setting alert confirmation prompt
Reset setting alert Cancel button. This will cancel the reset operation.
Reset setting alert settings Reset button. This will continue with the reset operation.

trans-unit.source: Vocable failed to reset. Please try again or reinstall Vocable if the issue persists.
trans-unit.target: Vocable kunne ikke nulstilles. Prøv igen, eller geninstaller Vocable hvis problemet fortsætter.
trans-unit.note: Reset app settings failure alert
Button to dismiss the Reset app failure alert

trans-unit.target: Vocable er blevet nulstillet med succes.
trans-unit.note: Reset app settings success alert
Button to dismiss the Reset app success alert

trans-unit.source: You're about to leave the Vocable app. You may lose head tracking control.
trans-unit.target: Du er ved at forlade Vocable. Du vil måske miste hovedsporingskontrol.
trans-unit.note: Body of confirmation alert shown when user is about to navigate to a destination where Vocable's head tracking will not be available.
Button cancelling the action that would have taken them away from the head tracking-navigable portion of the app
Button confirming that the user would like to navigate away from the head tracking-navigable portion of the app
edit categories settings menu item
contact developers settings menu item
Option within Selectin Mode. This option is to enable to disable head tracking via a toggle.
edit keyboard layout settings menu item
Listening Mode root settings menu item. Navigates the user to the Listening Mode settings screen where they can configure their preferences for listening mode.
view privacy policy settings menu item
Option within Keyboard Layout. This option is to enable or disable QWERTY keyboard on portrait iPhone.
reset all settings menu item
edit cursor selection mode settings menu item
edit cursor timing and sensititivy settings menu item
Settings option title for row that navigates to the Voice settings screen
Settings screen header title
Keyboard Layout setting header title

trans-unit.source: Use QWERTY keyboard layout in all orientations. Keys may be smaller, making typing more difficult.
trans-unit.target: Brug QWERTY tastaturlayout i alle retninger. Taster kan være mindre, hvilket gør det sværere at skrive dem.
trans-unit.note: Option within Keyboard Layout. This option is to enable or disable QWERTY keyboard on portrait iPhone.

trans-unit.source:
This %1$@ on %2$@ %3$@ does not support Listening Mode.
Listening Mode is currently only available in English and requires %5$@ to be enabled.
trans-unit.target:
Dette %1$@ på %2$@ %3$@ understøtter ikke Lyttetilstand.
Lyttetilstand er i øjeblikket kun tilgængelig på engelsk og kræver %5$@ for at være aktiveret.
trans-unit.note: Footer text displayed in the Listening Mode preferences screen. This is only displayed if the user's device does not support Listening Mode because of it's language or lack of neural engine.
Title of Listening Mode preferences cell that toggles "Hey Vocable" shortcut feature on or off when selected

trans-unit.source: Automatically navigate to the Listening Mode category when Vocable hears someone say "Hey, Vocable"
trans-unit.target: Naviger automatisk til kategorien Lyttetilstand, når Vocable hører nogen sige "Hey, Vocable"
trans-unit.note: Footer text displayed in the Listening Mode preferences screen. This text describes the "Hey Vocable" feature, how it is activated, and how it automatically navigates the user to the Listening Mode screen.

trans-unit.source: This is a conversational category that listens for someone to ask questions, then offers a selection of responses. Either/or questions and questions that can be answered with yes, no, or a number are currently supported.
trans-unit.target: Dette er en samtalekategori, der lytter til nogen at stille spørgsmål, og tilbyder derefter et udvalg af svar. Either/eller spørgsmål og spørgsmål, der kan besvares med ja, nej, eller et nummer understøttes i øjeblikket.
trans-unit.note: Footer text displayed in the Listening Mode preferences screen. This text describes the overall Listening Mode feature as well as the kinds of responses it can generate for the user.
Title of Listening Mode preferences cell that toggles Listening Mode on or off when selected

trans-unit.source: Smart Assist uses AI to provide higher-quality suggestions for Listening Mode. An Internet connection is required, but no conversation history is ever stored, just like in regular Listening Mode.
trans-unit.target: Smart Assist bruger AI til at levere forslag af højere kvalitet til lyttetilstand. En internetforbindelse er påkrævet, men ingen samtale historie nogensinde er gemt, ligesom i regelmæssig lytning tilstand.
trans-unit.note: Footer text displayed in the Listening Mode preferences screen. This text describes the Smart Assist feature and how it works.
Title of Smart Assist preferences cell that toggles the Smart Assist feature on or off when selected
Listening Mode preferences screen title

trans-unit.source:
This %1$@ on %2$@ %3$@ does not support head tracking.
Head tracking is supported on all devices with a %4$@ camera, and on most devices with %6$@.
trans-unit.target:
Dette %1$@ på %2$@ %3$@ understøtter ikke hovedsporing.
Hovedsporing understøttes på alle enheder med et %4$@ -kamera og på de fleste enheder med %6$@.
trans-unit.note: Additonal footer text noting heading tracking compatibility

Button in the edit category title close confirmation. This button appears in an alert when there are edits made to the Category title and the user tries to close the keyboard without saving the changes. Pressing the button will allow editing the category title.

Button in the edit category title close confirmation. This button appears in an alert when there are edits made to the Category title and the user tries to close the keyboard without saving the changes. Pressing the button will not save any changes and close the keyboard view.

trans-unit.source: If you close without saving, your changes will be lost.
trans-unit.target: Hvis du lukker uden at gemme, vil dine ændringer gå tabt.
trans-unit.note: Category close confirmation text. This text appears in an alert when there are edits made to the Category title and the user tries to close the keyboard without saving the changes.
Duplicate Category alert cancel button. Text on this button appears on an alert where a duplicate category title is being created. Pressing the button will allow continuing to edit category title
Duplicate Alert create duplicate button. Pressing this button will allow for multiple categories with the same title.

trans-unit.source: This category name already exists. Would you like to create a duplicate?
trans-unit.target: Dette kategorinavn findes allerede. Vil du oprette et duplikat?
trans-unit.note: Duplicate Category alert text. This text appears in an alert when a category is created with the same title as an existing category.
Button option for the Curson Sensitivity setting.
Button option for the Curson Sensitivity setting.
Button option for the Curson Sensitivity setting.
Text for a Timing and sensitivity setting. This setting is the sensitivity for the head tracking cursor.

Text for a Timing and sensitivity setting. This setting is the amount of time the head tracking cursor needs to stay on a button before it triggers it. Hove time can be adjusted in .5 sec increments from .5 to 5
Timing and sensitivity Header title. This text appears in the Settings flow when navigating into the Timing and Sensitivity setting

trans-unit.source: No voices that match your language and region settings are installed.
trans-unit.target: Ingen stemmer, der matcher dine sprog- og regionsindstillinger, er installeret.
trans-unit.note: Voice picker empty state body. Shown when the user attempts to change their voice settings and the operating system fails to return any viable voice profiles that the user could select from.
Voice picker empty state title.
Voice Picker title

In the voice configuration screen within the app's settings, this format is used to construct the phrase read aloud when the user selects a button to preview a voice profile. Each voice profile has a name provided by the operating system, so the phrase is currently structured as if the voice profile is introducing itself.
Button in the Voice Settings screen that will navigate the user to the voice picker/Change Voice screen
Button in the Voice Settings screen that will navigate the user to the Personal Voice screen
Voice Configuration title

trans-unit.source: Additional voices and voice quality enhancements may be available for download in %1$@ Settings.
trans-unit.target: Yderligere stemmer og forbedringer af talekvalitet kan være tilgængelige for download i %1$@ indstillinger.
trans-unit.note: Footer title that accompanies the button that will present the voice picker. This is meant to inform the user that additional voices can be downloaded from the system settings app. The parameter variable is substituted with the device model e.g. "iPad" or "iPhone".

trans-unit.target: Har du haft en god dag?

trans-unit.source: I need to brush my hair
trans-unit.target: Jeg har brug for at vaske redde mit hår

trans-unit.source: I need to go to the restroom
I need to wash my face
trans-unit.target: Jeg har brug for at vaske mit ansigt
Jeg har brug for et brusebad
Jeg har svært ved at trække vejret
Jeg vil gerne have en jakke
Jeg har brug for et bad
Jeg har brug for min medicin

trans-unit.source: I didn't mean to say that
trans-unit.target: Jeg mente ikke at sige det
